notes: Allergen records incomplete — staff cannot confirm dietary info without checking kitchen
description: Allergen information not available or EU FIC Regulation 1169/2011 requirements not met

notes: Temperature logs missing or incomplete for fridges
description: Use-by and best-before dates not checked systematically and expired stock found on premises

notes: Queue wait times exceed 5 minutes during peak hours
description: Customers regularly waiting more than 5 minutes in queue during peak periods

notes: Menu pricing does not reflect actual COGS
description: Customer toilets unclean undersupplied or not maintained to acceptable standard

notes: No waste tracking system in place
description: No standardised recipes or portion control for food and drink items

notes: No FOH reference materials visible at counter or service points
description: No written recipe cards or drink specification standards for the team to follow

notes: Role confusion during busy periods — staff unsure of task ownership
description: Front-of-house kitchen and barista roles not cross-trained

notes: Single person handling all service functions during peak — visible stress and delays
description: Morning peak period 7-10am poorly managed with long queues slow service understaffing
No daily team briefing or shift handover communication

notes: Counter layout creates bottlenecks during multi-task service
description: Counter machine and preparation area layout causing unnecessary movement or bottlenecks

notes: Tables remain uncleared 6-10 minutes after guests leave
description: No strategy for managing dwell time versus table turnover during peak periods

notes: Staffing levels not calibrated to observed peak demand
description: Staffing levels not aligned to actual peak-hour demand patterns

notes: FOH cleanliness inconsistent during service periods
description: General cleanliness standards inconsistent across front-of-house and customer areas

notes: Revenue appears heavily concentrated in morning period
description: Revenue concentrated in a single daypart such as morning only with no diversification

notes: Team not aligned on roles, responsibilities, or service standards
description: Team not aligned on service standards expected behaviours or quality expectations
